# GitHub Copilot Instructions for Grid Project

## Project Overview
This is the Grid project - a web-based library for managing and visualizing data in a grid format that is influenced to have features like that of XAML Grid Controls.

## Code Style Guidelines
- Use descriptive variable and function names
- Follow consistent indentation (spaces/tabs)
- Add comments for complex logic
- Keep functions focused and modular
- Use SOLID principles where applicable

## Technology Stack
- List your primary languages C#, JavaScript and Razor Syntax
- Frameworks being used are Blazor and .NET 10
- Key libraries or dependencies in use are DisplayGrid

## Architecture Patterns
- Using Blazor component-based architecture
